findings.description: The `mobile/doc/` folder is omitted. In the source, `mobile/doc/` is listed as a sibling to `mobile/ios/` at the `mobile/` level, containing architecture documentation (arch_doc/index.html). The KF only lists `mobile/ios/` as a sub-entry, so an AI cannot correctly answer questions about where the Nablarch mobile library architecture documentation is located.
findings.source_evidence: Source row: `mobile/doc/` — 解説書が格納されています（app_dev_env/mobile/doc/arch_doc/index.html）。KF lists `nablarch/app_dev_env/mobile/ios/` but has no entry for `nablarch/app_dev_env/mobile/doc/`.

findings.description: The `operation_sample/` parent folder is omitted. The source explicitly lists it as a folder with description「運用機能サンプルが格納されています」. The KF skips directly to `operation_sample/log_statistics_sample/`, so the intermediate container and its description are absent.
findings.source_evidence: Source row: `operation_sample/` — 運用機能サンプルが格納されています。KF has `nablarch/app_dev_env/app_lib/operation_sample/log_statistics_sample/` but no entry for `nablarch/app_dev_env/app_lib/operation_sample/`.

findings.description: The hint "Nablarch Toolbox" (or "Toolbox") is absent. `toolbox/` is an explicit top-level sub-folder of `app_dev_env/` listed in the source. Without this hint, the section may not be retrieved when a user asks where Nablarch Toolbox is located.
findings.source_evidence: Source row: `toolbox/` — Nablarch Toolbox が格納されています。Current hints do not include "Nablarch Toolbox" or "Toolbox".
